title: Karlo Balla
text: Home * People * Karlo Balla Karlo Balla [1] Karlo Balla , (Karlo Balla Jr., Karlo Bala Jr.) a Serbian computer scientist and assistant professor at Department of Media Studies, Faculty of Philosophy, University of Novi Sad , where he already obtained his Diploma and Master's degrees in CS in 2004 and 2010 respectively. His research interests include combinatorial optimization , artificial intelligence , logistics , data structures and algorithms , and E-learning . As a chess player [2] , he is further interested in chess programming, also working on an own, private engine [3] .
